ksa_text: Knowledge of DataOps frameworks and operational data management, including data pipeline reliability, data quality monitoring, data freshness SLAs, and continuous operational improvement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data classification policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.433) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.433 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Governance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Governance is not sufficiently central to the Director of AI/ML to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for Director of AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.433) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
